calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Iqbal Naiyer And Yvonne Feng Yi Liu To Set Aside Entry Of Default, Quash Service Of Summons, And For Leave To Defend

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default, Quash Service Of Summons, And For Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Russel Townsend, Esq. representing Jenny Q. Tan via Zoom Video Webinar.
Jamal Bisharat, process server for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Webinar.

No appearance of the defendant.

The Court rules as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Entry of Default, Quash Service of Summons, and for Leave to Defend is DENIED.

Counsel to prepare and submit the proposed order for approval and signature.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
